Skip to contents
boe 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Download M4 money supply

Source: R/boe_money_supply.R
boe_money_supply.Rd

Downloads monthly M4 (broad money) amounts outstanding from the Bank of England. Available from June 1982.

Usage

boe_money_supply(
  from = "1982-06-01",
  to = Sys.Date(),
  seasonally_adjusted = TRUE,
  cache = TRUE
)

Source

https://www.bankofengland.co.uk/boeapps/database/

Arguments

from

Date or character (YYYY-MM-DD). Start date. Defaults to "1982-06-01".

to

Date or character (YYYY-MM-DD). End date. Defaults to today.

seasonally_adjusted

Logical. Return seasonally adjusted series (default TRUE) or non-seasonally adjusted (FALSE).

cache

Logical. Use cached data if available (default TRUE).

Value

A data frame with columns:

date

Date. End of month.

amount_gbp_m

Numeric. M4 amounts outstanding (millions of pounds).

Examples

# \donttest{
boe_money_supply(from = "2000-01-01")
#> ℹ Downloading from Bank of England
#> ✔ Downloading from Bank of England [382ms]
#> 
#>           date amount_gbp_m
#> 1   2000-01-31       812294
#> 2   2000-02-29       816749
#> 3   2000-03-31       831223
#> 4   2000-04-30       839255
#> 5   2000-05-31       844444
#> 6   2000-06-30       850171
#> 7   2000-07-31       853641
#> 8   2000-08-31       865864
#> 9   2000-09-30       867471
#> 10  2000-10-31       875478
#> 11  2000-11-30       874563
#> 12  2000-12-31       881609
#> 13  2001-01-31       892265
#> 14  2001-02-28       892953
#> 15  2001-03-31       900354
#> 16  2001-04-30       904683
#> 17  2001-05-31       906081
#> 18  2001-06-30       915188
#> 19  2001-07-31       921011
#> 20  2001-08-31       928418
#> 21  2001-09-30       938046
#> 22  2001-10-31       942691
#> 23  2001-11-30       944329
#> 24  2001-12-31       940103
#> 25  2002-01-31       942270
#> 26  2002-02-28       949298
#> 27  2002-03-31       949470
#> 28  2002-04-30       954236
#> 29  2002-05-31       955105
#> 30  2002-06-30       969578
#> 31  2002-07-31       973122
#> 32  2002-08-31       981650
#> 33  2002-09-30       991395
#> 34  2002-10-31       994776
#> 35  2002-11-30      1000364
